reasoning: SaaS app with a 'sharp-edged data-factory' visual language requires Archetype 4. It provides authority, clarity, and function-first design. We'll use sharp edges, high contrast, and IBM Plex fonts.

rules.headings: Tracking-tight, sharp contrast. Use uppercase for labels. font-semibold to font-bold.
rules.body: Clean, readable, leading-relaxed. Use IBM Plex Mono for metrics, ids, and watcher config data.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-gray-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-gray-900
hierarchy.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-medium text-gray-500

buttons.primary: bg-gray-900 text-white rounded-none px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-gray-900
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-gray-900 border border-gray-300 rounded-none px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-gray-900
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-900 rounded-none px-4 py-2 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-gray-900
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white rounded-none px-6 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors

cards.interactive: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-none p-6 hover:border-gray-400 hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer

inputs.text: w-full border border-gray-300 bg-white rounded-none px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 focus:border-gray-900 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-gray-900 outline-none transition-colors font-mono text-sm

badges.default: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 border border-gray-200 text-xs font-mono font-medium bg-gray-50 text-gray-600
badges.active: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 border border-blue-200 text-xs font-mono font-medium bg-blue-50 text-blue-700

structure: Navigation: Sticky header, glassmorphism disabled (solid white background), strict border-b.
Hero Section: H1 (text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter), subtext, CTA buttons (Primary: Get Started, Secondary: Documentation). Use abstract geometric texture sparsely.
Social Proof/Logos: Black and white sponsor logos in a slow marquee.
Features Bento Grid: Asymmetrical grid showcasing Watcher config, Realtime Activity, Translation Jobs.
Footer: Deep gray (bg-gray-900) to contrast the white page, large bold branding, structural links.
Header: Simple overline + Title ('Simple, predictable pricing').
Toggle: Monthly / Annually (styled as segmented control, sharp edges).
Pricing Cards: 3 columns. 'Pro' tier highlighted with a 2px black border and black primary button. Use checkmarks (Phosphor icons) for feature lists.
FAQ: Accordion style with 1px border-b separators.
Split screen layout: Left side contains auth forms centered in a white box. Right side features a data-center / server room technical image.
Forms: Email/Password, Magic Link separator, OAuth buttons with provider logos.
Focus: Highly visible focus states on all inputs.
Sidebar Navigation: Fixed left, ultra-light (bg-gray-50, border-r border-gray-200) for a clean data-factory look.
Header: Breadcrumbs, search bar, user dropdown.
Main Content: 12-column grid layout.
Watcher Controls: Card with status indicator (green dot for active), mono-spaced configuration details.
Realtime Activity Feed: List layout, font-mono timestamps, alternating row colors (bg-white/bg-gray-50).
Translation Jobs: Data table. Shadcn UI table component with pagination, sharp headers.
Empty State: Gray dashed border card, muted phosphor icon (e.g., FolderDashed), mono-spaced message 'No jobs found.', and a primary CTA to 'Create Job'.
Loading State: Skeleton loaders with sharp rectangles (rounded-none bg-gray-200 animate-pulse). No spinners; use progress bars or skeletons for a data-factory feel.
Error State: Red outlined card (border-red-200 bg-red-50), alert icon, clear error message (font-mono), and 'Retry' button.

images.description: Abstract neon lines forming a futuristic landscape / digital data flow. Use with heavy white/gray overlay for light theme or invert for dark elements.
A rack of electronic equipment in a dark room. Good for split-screen auth side-panel.
Black and white vertical gradient texture for marketing section backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a sharp, technical look.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Stick strictly to IBM Plex Sans for UI text and IBM Plex Mono for metrics, ids, code, and logs.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes for robust automated testing.
Maintain strict sharp corners (`rounded-none`) across all components (buttons, inputs, cards) to fulfill the 'data-factory' visual language.
For the realtime feed, use `font-mono` for timestamps and system messages.
Avoid glassmorphism. Use solid colors and strict borders instead.
Ensure hover states significantly alter the contrast of elements to make the interface feel highly responsive.
Build the dashboard using a CSS grid approach to keep columns perfectly aligned.
Use Shadcn UI for dropdowns, dialogs, and tables, but strip away any rounded corners to match the theme.
